message:
feat: add FastEmbed embedding support for semantic search

- Add src/fastembed_embedder.rs for local embedding generation
- Update lib.rs with embedder module integration
- Update Cargo.toml/lock with fastembed dependencies

This enables semantic similarity search across X archive content
using local embeddings rather than requiring external API calls.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
